zh.lifeSummary: 當Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe於1180年出生在法國崔洛易特a利-素-洛易時，他的父親Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I49歲，母親Marie Mathilde de DONZY45歲。他於1215年與Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe于1180年出生在法国崔洛易特a利-素-洛易时，他的父亲Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I49岁，母亲Marie Mathilde de DONZY45岁。他于1215年与Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易傑布格斯享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sancerre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Ovila, Pierre.

French: habitational name from a region in Picardy, located to the southeast of the Somme river, named with Latin sana terra ‘healthy, wholesome land’, and perhaps also from Le Santerre, the name of several places in the northern part of France.

nameMeanings.name: Etienne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stephen
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

en.lifeSummary: When Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe was born in 1180, in Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, France, his father, Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I, was 49 and his mother, Marie Mathilde de DONZY, was 45. He married Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois in 1215. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1252, in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe est né en 1180, à Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, France, son père, Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Marie Mathilde de DONZY, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois en 1215. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1252, à Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe 1180 in Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I 49 und seine Mutter Marie Mathilde de DONZY 45. Er hat 1215 Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1252 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe è nato il nel 1180 nel Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Marie Mathilde de DONZY, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois nel 1215. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1252, nel Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupeが1180年にフランスセントアロイアーエトチaティロン-スル-ロイアーで生まれた時，父Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre Iは49歳，母Marie Mathilde de DONZYは45歳であった。1215年にAliénor de Nesle-Vermandoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーチャーボウルジェズで72歳で死去した。

ko.Sancerre: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스

ko.lifeSummary: Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe(이)가 1180년 프랑스 세트르 로이렛 cha틸론-수-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie Mathilde de DONZY(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1215년 Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 처 부르그스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe nasceu em 1180, em Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, França, seu pai, Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Marie Mathilde de DONZY, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois em 1215. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1252, em Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, França, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe родился в 1180 г. в местности чaтиллон-сур-лоир, лоирет, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie Mathilde de DONZY, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois в 1215 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1252 г. в местности бургесь, чир, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Etienne de Sancerre II  Grand Butler of France, Lord of Châtillon-sur-Long, Saint-Brisson and La Loupe nació en 1180, en Châtillon-sur-Loire, Loiret, Centre, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Blois-Champagne de Sancerre I, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Marie Mathilde de DONZY, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Aliénor de Nesle-Vermandois en 1215. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1252, en Bourges, Cher, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
